label: Spawn Selected NPC
notes: Uses npc_roster label resolved through actor_enum_map.csv and CREATE_ACTOR_IN_LAYOUT

label: Follow Player
notes: Sets spawned actors as companions and sends TASK_FOLLOW_ACTOR

label: Stand Guard
notes: Clears current task and holds position

label: Defend Player
notes: Companion follow behavior; use with lawman faction for hostile response

label: Attack Nearest Hostile
notes: Scans world actors and sends spawned actors after nearest actor hostile to player

label: Idle Spawned Actors
notes: Clears current task and stands still

label: Wander Spawned Actors
notes: Clears current task and sends TASK_WANDER

label: Make Spawned Actors Lawmen
notes: Sets spawned actors to US law faction and companion follow

label: Join Lawman Side
notes: Sets player to US law faction until restored

label: Join Gang Side
notes: Sets player to generic criminal/gang faction until restored

label: Restore Player Faction
notes: Restores the saved player faction or default player faction

label: Native Tests
notes: Opens the integrated native smoke-test menu for MP/script natives

label: Connect MP Server
notes: Starts the SLikeNet PoC client using CodeRED_AI_Menu.ini [mp] host/port

label: Toggle MP Bare World
notes: Toggles MP runtime cleanup around the local player

label: Bare World Purge Now
notes: Immediately removes ambient actors near the local MP player while protecting player remotes and CodeRED spawns

label: Toggle Bare Population
notes: Toggles runtime population density suppression for the MP bare world experiment
